title: - Sound + Identity
content:
- Sound + Identity
- Archive + Ritual
- AI + Narrative Structure
- Dream Analysis + Design Systems

---

### IV. | BUSINESS / COMMODITY SYSTEM

Each system component is **codifiable, monetizable, and modular**.

#### Mapped by output type:

| OUTPUT TYPE | FORMAT | BUSINESS USE CASE |
|---------------------|-------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Narrative Projects | Essays, Podcasts, Series | Sales, subscriptions, paid media |
| Apps & Tools | Language processors, planners | Niche markets, creative UX, freemium models|
| Courses | PDFs, Zines, Online classes | Sliding scale or institutional licensing |
| Archives & Anthologies | Books, searchable systems | Academic CV, grant application materials |
